title: Augment Code — Context-Aware AI Coding Assistant
abstract: Augment Code is an AI-powered coding assistant that differentiates through deep codebase understanding — indexing entire repositories to provide context-aware completions, refactoring, and code generation that respects project-wide patterns and conventions.
why_we_care: Augment's approach of indexing the full codebase addresses one of the biggest limitations of current AI coding tools — lack of project-wide context. If it delivers on this promise, it could significantly reduce the hallucination and inconsistency issues we experience with general-purpose assistants. Worth comparing against GitHub Copilot's workspace indexing capabilities.
summary: Augment Code is an AI coding assistant focused on deep codebase understanding — it indexes entire repositories to deliver context-aware completions, refactoring, and generation that respect project conventions.
description:
## Overview

Augment Code is a VS Code extension and IDE integration that provides AI-assisted coding with a focus on deep codebase awareness. Unlike general-purpose LLM integrations, Augment indexes the entire repository to understand project structure, coding patterns, and dependencies.

## Key Differentiators

- **Deep codebase indexing**: Understands entire repo structure, not just open files
- **Convention awareness**: Learns and applies project-specific coding patterns
- **Cross-file refactoring**: Can make coherent changes across multiple files
- **Enterprise focus**: SOC 2 compliant, supports private deployment
- **VS Code + JetBrains**: Multi-IDE support

## Competitive Position

Positioned between GitHub Copilot (broad but shallow context) and autonomous agents (Devin/Claude Code). Emphasizes accuracy over autonomy.
